title: Mini Rainbow Kids, Toddler Football - 5 Inch (Pack of 4) Inflatable Ball Made from Vinyl with Hand Pump Football, Neon Basketball, Soccer Ball, and Volleyball for Playground, Indoor and Outdoor Use
features: PACK OF 4 - 5 INCH RAINBOW BALLS FOR SPORTS: Each pack of Bedwina Rainbow Inflatable Footballs includes a total of 4 - 5 Inch round inflatable air footballs for kids and toddlers. Balls arrive deflated with a Bonus Hand Ball Pump and Needle to quickly and easily inflate when ready to use. They are bright and rainbow neon colours and every order includes 1 - Basketball, 1 - Football, 1 - Volleyball & 1 - Random Style

BONUS PUMP INCLUDED! ONE OF EACH STYLE: Our rainbow inflatable ball set includes at least one of each sport and perfect for boys and girls. The bright neon colours are great for playing outside and easier to see when the sun starts to set. Includes 1 hand pump with needle

GREAT OUTDOOR & INDOOR BALL! FUN FOR KIDS AND TODDLERS: They are easy for smaller hands to grab and fun for everyone. These vinyl play balls have a textured grip and bounce well when using with toddler basketball hoops or playing catch. An ideal sports toy to keep your kids active and get some fresh air

HIGH QUALITY! PLAY LONGER: Rainbow plastic ball set is made of thick PVC material (Polyvinyl chloride), that will not deflate easily when playing. They are non-toxic, safe for kids, measures 6 inches in diameter, and designed for indoor and outside play. Arrives INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED, DEFLATED AND INCLUDES HAND AIR PUMP

100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: When shopping for plastic footballs for kids with Bedwina you can be rest assured that if for whatever reason you are not 100% satisfied, we'll take back your product, no questions asked. We are here to make you 100% happy and provide the best customer service to our customers.
Warning: CHOKING HAZARD -- Small parts. Not for children under 3 yrs.
